---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

**What happened?**
A clear description of the problem and what you expected instead.

**Which step failed?**
- [ ] Double-clicking RunBondScribe.bat (setup)
- [ ] App opens but stuck on "Loading speech model…"
- [ ] No transcript / level meter doesn't move
- [ ] "Send to AI" / AI pane
- [ ] Other

**Logs (please attach both — they're in your BondScribe folder):**
- `bondscribe-setup.log`
- `bondscribe.log`

**System info**
- Windows version (e.g. Windows 11 23H2):
- NVIDIA GPU? (yes/no, model if known):
- Did you install BondScribe outside Program Files? (yes/no):

**Anything else?**
Screenshots, exact error text, etc.
